message:
feat(updater): add self-update and version management system

Implement the updater module for checking and applying updates to
the ms CLI tool itself and managing version compatibility.

src/updater/mod.rs:
- Module organization and public exports
- Update workflow coordination

src/updater/check.rs:
- UpdateChecker for version comparison
- GitHub releases API integration
- Semantic version parsing and comparison
- Update availability detection
- Pre-release and stable channel support

src/updater/download.rs:
- UpdateDownloader for fetching new versions
- Platform-specific binary selection
- Progress reporting for large downloads
- Resume support for interrupted downloads
- Temporary file management

src/updater/verify.rs:
- UpdateVerifier for integrity validation
- SHA256 checksum verification
- GPG signature verification (optional)
- Binary permission validation
- Rollback preparation on verification failure

Update workflow:
1. Check for newer versions via GitHub API
2. Download appropriate binary for platform
3. Verify checksum and optional signature
4. Backup current binary
5. Replace with new version
6. Verify new binary works (--version check)
7. Clean up backup on success, rollback on failure

CLI integration:
- ms update check: Query for available updates
- ms update apply: Download and install update
- ms update --auto: Unattended update installation

Respects security settings from config:
- require_signatures: Enforce GPG verification
- allow_prerelease: Include pre-release versions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
